hero.descripcion: Full stack web development with experience in Angular and Spring Boot, and projects in game development and VR.

sobreMi.p1: I'm Alejandro, a web developer with experience in Angular (TS) and Spring Boot (Java). I also work in game development with Unity (C#), which gives me a different perspective when thinking about user experience and interfaces.
sobreMi.p2: Games and VR are not just a hobby, they are real projects that complement my web profile and give me a broader vision of how people interact with technology.

descripcion: Design and creation of PDF documents generated with Jasper deployed on JasperServer.
Web application development as frontend in Angular 16.
Web application development with Spring backend (REST API) and Angular frontend.
Data management application with Excel over database.
File management application in internal directories.
Container weighing desktop application at plant.
Design, creation and management of SQL Server databases for the mentioned software.
Training courses in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript.
Use of web development technologies (HTML, CSS, JavaScript).
Training in JavaScript Lit Element library.

videojuegos.titulo: Specialization Course in Video Game and Virtual Reality Development
videojuegos.descripcion: Training in video game development with Unity and C#, covering mechanics programming, interactive interface design and scene management.

dam.titulo: Higher Degree in Cross-Platform Application Development (Not completed)

daw.titulo: Higher Degree in Web Application Development
daw.descripcion: Training in full stack web development, relational databases and application deployment.

hoppr.descripcion: Home task management app for expenses, recipes and shopping lists, installed on a Raspberry PI connected to Github.

museo.descripcion: Interactive VR environment set in a video game museum, where the player can explore and interact with displays of consoles and accessories to obtain information.

galeria.descripcion: Shooting gallery in virtual reality with shooting mechanics, object physics, impact detection and immersive 3D environment.

plataformas.descripcion: 2D platformer game developed in Unity implementing player movement systems, collision detection, animations with Animator and level building with Tilemaps.

car.descripcion: Project aimed at applying development techniques such as procedural scene generation based on level, player progression, data persistence using JSON and PlayerPrefs, and Photon PUN for the multiplayer environment.

contacto.subtitulo: Have a proposal or question? Contact me!

tecnologias.translate: Internationalization in ES, EN, DE, JA and RU

optimizaciones.touch: Elimination of touch delay on mobile
